description: Complete ECB systemic-stress data layer: auto-discovers + pulls every fresh CISS + CLIFS series (EA composite/sub-indices/correlation, SovCISS, country CISS, CLIFS) with full history to 1980. Output data/ciss-stress.json.

schedule.description: CISS/CLIFS full stress layer — daily 07:10 UTC (after ECB daily publish)
